nasb.text: and they shall be abhorrent to you; you may not eat of their flesh, and their carcasses you shall detest.

esv.text: You shall regard them as detestable; you shall not eat any of their flesh, and you shall detest their carcasses.

cnv.text: 牠們是你們憎惡之物；牠們的肉，你們不可吃；牠們的屍體，你們要憎惡。

ccb.text: 它们都是可憎之物，不可吃它们的肉，也不可摸它们的尸体。
